mission.title: knative-eventing: v0.14.0-upgrade job fails when using Istio auto-injection
mission.description: v0.14.0-upgrade job fails when using Istio auto-injection. This issue affects 6+ users.

steps.title: Identify knative-eventing troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your knative-eventing deployment:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n knative-eventing -l app.kubernetes.io/name=knative-eventing
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=knative-eventing -n knative-eventing --tail=100 | grep -i error
```
Look for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue.

steps.title: Review knative-eventing configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant knative-eventing configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n knative-eventing -l app.kubernetes.io/name=knative-eventing
kubectl get configmap -n knative-eventing -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=knative-eventing
```
When installing the knative eventing operator the `v0.14.0-upgrade` jobs fails with the following error.

steps.title: Apply the fix for v0.14.0-upgrade job fails when using Istio auto-injection
steps.description:
- Add `sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"` to upgrade job

- 🐛 Fix bug

**Release Note**
```yaml
{"level":"warn","ts":1587242704.338062,"logger":"fallback","caller":"v0.14.0/upgrader.go:42","msg":"Failed to list namespaces: Get https://172.20.0.1:443/api/v1/namespaces: dial tcp 172.20.0.1:443: connect: connection refu
Broker Upgrade failed with: Get https://172.20.0.1:443/api/v1/namespaces: dial tcp 172.20.0.1:443: connect: connection refused
```

steps.title: Upgrade knative-eventing to include the fix
steps.description:
If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade knative-eventing:
```bash
helm repo update
helm upgrade knative-eventing knative-eventing/knative-eventing --namespace knative-eventing
```
Verify the upgrade:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n knative-eventing
helm list -n knative-eventing
```

steps.title: Confirm v0.14.0-upgrade job fails when using Istio… is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
```bash
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=knative-eventing -n knative-eventing --tail=50 --since=5m
kubectl get events -n knative-eventing --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone.

resolution.summary:
- Add `sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"` to upgrade job

- 🐛 Fix bug

**Release Note**
codeSnippets:
{"level":"warn","ts":1587242704.338062,"logger":"fallback","caller":"v0.14.0/upgrader.go:42","msg":"Failed to list namespaces: Get https://172.20.0.1:443/api/v1/namespaces: dial tcp 172.20.0.1:443: connect: connection refu
Broker Upgrade failed with: Get https://172.20.0.1:443/api/v1/namespaces: dial tcp 172.20.0.1:443: connect: connection refused

apiVersion: batch/v1
kind: Job
metadata:
  name: v0.14.0-upgrade
  namespace: knative-eventing
  labels:
    eventing.knative.dev/release: "v0.14.0"
spec:
  template:
    metadata:
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: eventing-controller
      restartPolicy: Never
      containers:
      - name: upgrade-brokers
        image: gcr.io/knative-releases/knative.dev/eventing/cmd/upgrade/v0.14.0@sha256:3f796b810f763325678730849021bf53ce7b6016848f880f27298e4db9112d0f

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with knative-eventing installed or the issue environment reproducible.
